sentences.base_language: "I" is the first-person singular pronoun. In Chinese it is "我" (wǒ).
sentences.target_language: "我"是第一人称单数代词，用来指自己。

sentences.base_language: "He" and "his" are used for a male person. In Chinese: 他, 他的.
"We" and "our" refer to a group including yourself. In Chinese: 我们, 我们的.
sentences.target_language: "我们"和"我们的"指包括自己在内的群体。

sentences.base_language: "You are", "I am", "he is" — these are forms of the verb "to be". In Chinese, "是" (shì) is used for identity and "在" (zài) for location.
sentences.target_language: "你是"、"我是"、"他是" — 这些都是动词"是"的用法，表示身份。

sentences.base_language: "To go", "to do", "to make" — these are common action verbs. In Chinese: 去, 做.
sentences.target_language: "去"、"做" — 这些是汉语中常用的动作动词。

sentences.base_language: "To have", "to want", "it is" — essential verbs for everyday conversation.
sentences.target_language: "有"、"想要"、"是" — 日常对话中必不可少的动词。

sentences.base_language: "Can", "to know", "to think" — verbs for ability and thought. In Chinese: 能/可以, 知道, 想/认为.
sentences.target_language: "能"、"知道"、"认为" — 表达能力和思维的动词。

sentences.base_language: "To need", "to drink", "to give" — more useful everyday verbs.
sentences.target_language: "需要"、"喝"、"给" — 更多日常生活中常用的动词。

sentences.base_language: "On" and "on top of" describe position. In Chinese: 在…上, 上面.
sentences.target_language: "在…上"和"上面"表示某物在另一物的上方。

sentences.base_language: "To" shows direction or destination, and "sleep" is a basic daily action.
sentences.target_language: "到"或"向"表示方向或目的地。"睡觉"是基本的日常动作。

sentences.base_language: "Above", "from", and "below" are prepositions that describe location or origin.
sentences.target_language: "上面"、"从"、"下面" — 表示位置或来源的介词。

sentences.base_language: "Where", "when", and "which" are question words. In Chinese: 哪里, 什么时候, 哪个.
sentences.target_language: "哪里"、"什么时候"、"哪个" — 常用的疑问词。

sentences.base_language: "And", "or", "but", "because" are connectors that join ideas together.
sentences.target_language: "和"、"或者"、"但是"、"因为" — 连接词，用于连接两个想法。
